description:
Configure bcWebCam to ignore QR codes and scan standard EAN-13 barcodes instead. 1. Open bcWebCam and navigate to its barcode settings/options. 2. Disable 'QR Code' scanning so it stops reading promotional URLs. 3. Ensure 'EAN-13' scanning is enabled. 4. Close the settings. 5. Look up the product barcode '5449000000996' in the provided database at 'C:\workspace\data\openfoodfacts_beverages.csv'. 6. Create a text file at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\product_report.txt' formatted EXACTLY as follows:
Barcode: 5449000000996
Product: [extracted_product_name]
Brand: [extracted_brand]
Nutriscore: [extracted_nutriscore]
